module.name: addclass
module.description: Wrap a region in a div carrying the given CSS classes. Section 1 = space-separated class names, section 2 = content. Use it to apply theme/utility classes (or your own scoped CSS via @addstyle) to a block of slide content.
module.aiSpec: Wrap a block of slide content in a <div> with extra CSS classes (theme/utility classes, or classes you defined via @addstyle). Block module split by `<!-- @ -->` into two sections: section 1 = space-separated class names, section 2 = the markdown content to wrap. Gotcha: if you omit the `<!-- @ -->` separator, the single section is treated as content (no classes applied). Example: `<!-- @addclass -->`, then `highlight rounded`, `<!-- @ -->`, then content.

snippet.label: Add class
snippet.description: Wrap the content in a div with the given classes.
